title: PDCBVC rule BR-005
embedding_text: PDCBVC business rule BR-005 in scope BROWSE-FASE1. If (TWCOB-FUNZIONE = 'I' OR 'A' OR 'C' OR 'D' OR 'P') AND TWCOB-ID-SISTEMA = 'IP' AND PXCSEMAF-STATUS = 1 then JUMP -> XCTL-LIV4. Category=permission. Kind=business. Severity=block.
